<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List of contracts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/my/contracts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of customer's active revolving loan contracts.

| Feature                              | Supported by resource |
| ---                                  | ---                   |
| [paging](#introduction/paging)       | No                    |
| [sorting](#introduction/sorting)     | No                    |
| [filtering](#introduction/filtering) | No                    |

Possible error codes explanation:
| Error status code | Code         | Explanation                 |
| --- | ---                        | ---                         |
| 404 | RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND         | Resource could not be found |
| 500 | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR      | Internal failure            |

  parameters={undefined}
>
